fields.label: List Name or ID
fields.description: ID of list to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Resolve Data
fields.description: By default the response just includes the contact ID. If this option gets activated, it will resolve the data automatically.

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: birth_date, cellphone, extraFieldsUi, first_name, last_name, status, tagIds)
